72878dadab.translation: When our behavior and our attitudes conflict, an inner conflict arises. Psychologists call this "cognitive dissonance." Usually, the person then seeks some justification for their inconsistent behavior.

7287eec5de.translation: By now, there were hardly any healthy young men who did not walk around in uniform, so I now stood out even more because I was wearing civilian clothes, which made me all the more conspicuous.

7288df9ef1.translation: So, the thousands and tens of thousands of Jewish and non-Jewish Germans mistakenly called "emigrants," who fled Germany immediately after January 30, 1933, out of justifiable fear for their body and life.

728d46398f.translation: Nevertheless, 'the Jews' were fought by many, with religious and economic arguments, and finally increasingly with biologically grounded antisemitism, which aimed at the extermination of the foreign 'race' and largely realized it.

728e43ddf8.translation: Only Saudi Arabia and the United Arab Emirates operate pipelines that circumvent the Strait of Hormuz and can also transport oil outside the Persian Gulf.

728ec00492.text: „Die Energiewende jedoch, die ich im Prinzip als richtig und unabwendbar betrachte, ist – aus der Fukushima-Panik geboren, nicht aus kühler Erwägung – so verkorkst, dass nur ein konzeptioneller Neuansatz, eine zeitliche Streckung und eine konjunktur- wie klimaverträgliche Verteilung der Lasten helfen kann.“
728ec00492.translation: However, the energy transition, which I generally consider correct and inevitable, is — born out of the Fukushima panic, not from cool consideration — so messed up that only a conceptual new approach, a stretching out in time, and a distribution of burdens that is compatible with the economy and climate can help.

72e176e289.translation: And it was also Honecker who in 1952 announced the introduction of rifle training, parachute jumping and motorized flying at the FDJ; he subsequently devoted all his energy to popularizing rearmament among youth.

72e7e61746.text: Ich kann das so nicht akzeptieren, Sie wollen nicht nachbessern, aber ich glaube trotzdem, dass wir uns irgendwie verständigen werden. Wie wäre es mit einem Nachlass?

72e7f805ca.text: „Die Schachsteine (aus Holz, Elfenbein u. s. w.) sind 32 an der Zahl, 16 weisse für den einen und 16 schwarze für den anderen Spieler. Jeder hat nämlich 8 Offiziere und 8 Bauern ♙♟. Die Offiziere sind ein König ♔♚, eine Dame ♕♛, zwei Thürme (Rochen) ♖♜, zwei Läufer ♗♝ und zwei Springer (Rössel) ♘♞. Läufer und Springer pflegt man unter dem Namen "leichte Offiziere" zusammenzufassen.“
72e7f805ca.translation: The chess pieces (made of wood, ivory, etc.) are 32 in number, 16 white for one player and 16 black for the other. Each player has 8 officers and 8 pawns ♙♟. The officers are one king ♔♚, one queen ♕♛, two rooks (castles) ♖♜, two bishops ♗♝ and two knights (horses) ♘♞. Bishops and knights are usually grouped together under the name "light pieces."

72e814204f.text: Ich würde mir gerne dein Auto für einen Tag leihen.
